calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Request For Default Judgment At Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for request of default judgment against Defendant Rice Valley Inc., Cuong T Do and Wei Cai.

Dept:505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:21:33 a.m. and concluding at 9:36:49 a.m.(D505)

Paul J. Steiner, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Royal Ingredients Group BV via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Rice Valley Inc. not appearing.
Defendant Cuong T Do not appearing.
Defendant Wei Cai not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract filed August 10, 2017.
Proof of substituted service as to Defendant Cuong T Do on August 25, 2017, effectuated September 4, 2017.
Proof of substituted service as to Defendant Rice Valley Inc. on August 25, 2017, effectuated September 4, 2017.
Proof of substituted service as to Defendant Wei Cai on August 25, 2017, effectuated on September 4, 2017.
Default entered as to Defendants Cuong T Do, Wei Cai and Rice Valley Inc. on December 21, 2017.

Counsel to summarize the causes of action and to provide proof. Counsel informs the Court that plaintiff will be limited to the breach of contract action.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: Proof of service filed against Defendant Cuong T Do
Exhibit B: Proof of service filed against Defendant Rice Valley, Inc.
Exhibit C: Proof of service filed against Defendant Wei Cai.
Exhibit D: CA Secretary of State Statement of Information
Exhibit E: Invoice NL160188
Exhibit F: Invoice NL16023
Exhibit G: Invoice NL160360

After reviewing the declarations, considering all the evidence, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has met their prima facie case and rules in favor of Plaintiff Royal Ingredients Group BV and against Defendants Rice Valley Inc., Cuong T Do and Wei Cai as follows:

Plaintiff is to recover the following from the named Defendants:
Damages $46,080.00
Interest $36,698.10
Costs $886.25
Total Judgment $83,664.35

Proposed Judgment signed and executed this day.
